description: Black gloves made of 100% acrylic from quiksilver. Don't let the winter chill or the pollution on the streets rain on your fashion parade! These stylish gloves, that are as easy to wear as they are fashionable, will keep your fingers safe and warm.Made of 100% acrylic for comfortRibbed elastic foldable cuffs for a customised FitBranding on the cuffsGlove careHand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
